heading_path: 机械波 / 相位突变与半波损失
masked_text:
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01997:202b8cf88416]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01998:ff2eb9e78880]]{note}
固定端反射通常对应波节，自由端反射通常对应波腹。
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01999:06b3847e1b6f]]{note}
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02000:1ed622168fac]]

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02001:347ca72528e4]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02002:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
对波 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02003:16048af5f80e]]，总传播路程为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02004:4a6ade361912]]，且反射时多出一项 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02005:77017ff02edc]]；对波 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02006:07b947148267]]，传播路程为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02007:9483c0d494ec]]，无额外相位突变。于是
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02008:100f593360d8]]
两列波在 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02009:b06e9eb4fb6b]] 点分别为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02010:eafbcb5355c7]]、[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02011:dc3e8cebf43a]]，合振动恒为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02012:5766ec8054c9]]。若漏掉半波损失，本题会被误判为同相加强；反射题要先判断这次反射是否翻相，再合并传播路程。
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02013:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02014:501cefb8bacf]]

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02015:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
设所求反向波为
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02016:65618f8640c8]]
在 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02017:a6eaf1b0ba56]] 处，已知波的相位为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02018:29a6816683f2]]，补充波的相位为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02019:569a8164b903]]。端点为波节要求两者任意时刻相互抵消，因此两相位相差 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02020:77017ff02edc]]：
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02021:bb7f693d2b55]] 
所求简谐波可写为
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02022:be6f7ef703e9]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02023:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02024:ac7d738b3446]]

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02025:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
设补充波为
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02026:8afec20256a2]] 
在 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02027:a6eaf1b0ba56]] 处，已知波相位为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02028:69abbc161c57]]。要形成波腹，补充波在 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02029:a6eaf1b0ba56]] 处应与它同相，因此 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02030:634f67b2b377]]。所求波可写为
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02031:8c5a10ee2313]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02032:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02033:6cb7d81ffb8f]]

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02034:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
波阻更大时，[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02035:16048af5f80e]] 点相当于波节，故反射波在 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02036:9ca8123332dd]] 处反相。设
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02037:e9c07dbfa443]]
由 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02038:73fb5a022ba8]] 得 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02039:d129306fdef9]]（[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02040:aec7630b5d9a]]），故
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02041:70099f4c0d61]]
其振幅为
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02042:a9e420b559a0]]
令 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02043:65009871876c]]，得 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02044:ade2904c79ff]]，为波节；
令 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02045:785fa8b2db78]] 取最大值，得 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02046:15b1e3958816]]，为波腹。
故 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02047:0966aac24869]] 内，波节为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02048:186214b5edfd]]，波腹为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02049:b2f6d0ee0364]]。
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02050:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02051:ea50df4f6ab5]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02052:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
入射波在 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02053:a6eaf1b0ba56]] 处引起的振动为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02054:d381fc167b80]]，固定端反射要求反射波在端点处为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02055:aec1ab0aa7b0]]。
反射波沿 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02056:5b3d499a40f8]] 方向传播，因此可写成
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02057:cd513ebc18c2]] 
两列波叠加后
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02058:a4255e53f7f1]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02059:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}
